title: Intensely Citrusy Australian Prawns Skewers
description: A flavorful and adventurous Australian dish featuring succulent prawns, citrusy butter, and a robata-grill finish, this recipe is FODMAP-friendly and perfect for a dinner gathering.
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the prawns onto skewers, leaving a small space between each prawn.
In a small bowl, mix together the softened butter, lemon zest, orange zest, lemon juice, orange juice, garlic-infused oil, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the citrusy butter mixture onto both sides of the prawns.
Grill the prawn skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and cooked through.
Serve the prawn skewers immediately, garnished with additional lemon zest and orange zest if desired.
Repeat the grilling process for the remaining prawn skewers.
Let the prawn skewers rest for 1 minute before serving.
